assertions.assertion: Calls AddOAuth2Introspection with Authority set to 'https://auth.mycompany.com'
assertions.rationale: AddOAuth2Introspection is called with the correct authority.

assertions.assertion: Sets ClientId to 'invoicing' and ClientSecret to 'invoicing_secret'
assertions.rationale: ClientId and ClientSecret are set correctly.

assertions.assertion: Mentions or adds the Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.OAuth2Introspection or Duende.IdentityServer.AccessTokenValidation package
assertions.rationale: The response mentions needing an OAuth2 introspection NuGet package but does not name the specific Duende package.

assertions.assertion: Warns that the ApiResource in IdentityServer must have ApiSecrets configured for introspection to work
assertions.rationale: No mention of ApiSecrets being required on the IdentityServer side.
